# `dnsight caa generate`

Print suggested CAA records.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--issuers` | text | ‚Äî | no | Comma-separated CA domains for 0 issue lines. |
| `--emit-issuewild` / `--no-emit-issuewild` | bool | `false` | no | Emit issuewild lines matching issuers. |
| `--iodef-mailto` | text | ‚Äî | no | mailto address for 0 iodef line (optional). |
